data.change_summary: Added Minimal flow preset (PlanAndImplement + FinalReview only) across 5 files: FlowPreset enum variant and methods in domain.rs, stage constants/flow definition/semantics in workflow_composition/mod.rs, planning_stage_for_flow match arm in project_run_record/service.rs, and new tests in both flow_preset_test.rs and flow_semantics_test.rs.
outstanding_risks: The pre-existing checkpoint_test failure is unrelated but should be investigated separately to keep the test suite green

steps.description: Add Minimal variant to FlowPreset enum, update ALL constant to [Self; 5], add as_str/description/FromStr branches in src/shared/domain.rs

Define MINIMAL_STAGES and MINIMAL_LATE_STAGES constants, expand FLOW_DEFINITIONS to [FlowDefinition; 5] with new entry, add flow_definition match arm, add flow_semantics match arm in src/contexts/workflow_composition/mod.rs
Add FlowPreset::Minimal arm to planning_stage_for_flow in src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs
Update registry test name and assertion for 5 presets, add minimal_flow_stage_order_matches_spec test in tests/unit/flow_preset_test.rs
Add minimal_flow_semantics_match_spec test and include Minimal in prompt_review toggle test in tests/unit/flow_semantics_test.rs

validation_evidence: cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes cleanly with zero warnings
All 6 flow_preset_test tests pass including new built_in_flow_registry_exposes_all_five_presets_in_order and minimal_flow_stage_order_matches_spec
All 8 flow_semantics_test tests pass including new minimal_flow_semantics_match_spec and updated non_standard_stage_plans_ignore_prompt_review_toggle
669 of 670 total tests pass; the single failure (checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_excludes_tracked_runtime_workspace_from_checkpoint_commits) is pre-existing and unrelated to these changes
Minimal flow semantics: execution_stage = PlanAndImplement (correct restart target for final_review), remediation_trigger_stages is empty (no intermediate review), late_stages = [FinalReview]
